components.description: Next.js App Router - pages, layouts, and API routes
NextAuth.js v5 authentication with Google OAuth
Subscription CRUD and bulk operations API
Main dashboard UI pages (subscriptions, rollup, settings)
Gmail API client, detection logic, unsubscribe handling
BullMQ job queue for background tasks
React components including shadcn/ui and dashboard components
Database schema with User, Subscription, GmailSyncState models
Multi-container setup with app, PostgreSQL, and Redis

smoke_checks.title: Application builds successfully
smoke_checks.steps: Run npm run build and verify production build completes without errors

smoke_checks.title: Code passes ESLint checks
smoke_checks.steps: Run npm run lint and verify no critical errors

smoke_checks.title: Database schema is valid
smoke_checks.steps: Run npx prisma validate to check schema.prisma syntax

smoke_checks.title: Database migrations can be applied
smoke_checks.steps: Run npx prisma migrate deploy to verify migrations apply cleanly

smoke_checks.title: Health check endpoint responds
smoke_checks.steps: Run dev server and curl http://localhost:3000/api/health, expect 200 OK

smoke_checks.title: Authentication routes exist
smoke_checks.steps: Verify src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts exists and exports auth configuration

smoke_checks.title: Gmail detection module exists
smoke_checks.steps: Verify src/modules/gmail/detection.ts contains subscription detection logic

smoke_checks.title: Job queue configuration exists
smoke_checks.steps: Verify src/modules/queues/config.ts exists and defines queue connections

smoke_checks.title: Subscription API endpoints exist
smoke_checks.steps: Verify src/app/api/subscriptions/route.ts exists with CRUD operations

smoke_checks.title: Gmail webhook endpoint exists
smoke_checks.steps: Verify src/app/api/webhook/gmail/route.ts exists for push notifications

smoke_checks.title: Docker build succeeds
smoke_checks.steps: Run docker build -t prunebox . and verify image builds without errors

smoke_checks.title: Docker compose configuration is valid
smoke_checks.steps: Run docker-compose config to verify compose file syntax

smoke_checks.title: Environment variables are documented
smoke_checks.steps: Verify .env.example exists with all required variables documented

smoke_checks.title: Dashboard page renders
smoke_checks.steps: Run dev server and navigate to http://localhost:3000/dashboard, verify page loads

visual_areas.title: Sign-in page with Google OAuth button
Subscription list table with sender names, email counts, and action buttons
Scan button component for initiating Gmail scans
Rollup digest settings page with delivery time and frequency options
User settings page with account preferences
Subscription action dialog (keep, unsubscribe, rollup options)
Toast notifications for scan progress and action results
How It Works page explaining subscription detection

audit_areas.title: Section 5: Automated unsubscription via List-Unsubscribe header
Section 6: Database schema for subscription tracking
Section 8: Google verification process and CASA compliance
Section 9: Legal compliance requirements (GDPR, privacy policy)
Section 10: Product architecture and feature requirements
Section 2: Competitive landscape and feature gaps
